releaseRecommendation: NOT READY, but materially closer. Primary data store decided and F001/F005/F008 persistence built (unit-tested, not yet run live). 9 of 10 OWNER_DECISIONS.md items remain open. Next concrete step: provision a Neon project, set DATABASE_URL, run migrations/001_initial_schema.sql, and re-run the persistence-layer tests against the real database before trusting any of it in a deployed environment. After that, the next highest-leverage owner decision is pricing (unblocks F026/F027/F028/F050/F052, all engine-complete and waiting).
